notes:
v1.0.11 — Embedded terminal

• Full embedded PowerShell terminal (xterm.js + Windows ConPTY)
• Opens in the current folder automatically
• Follows navigation — re-spawns when you change directories
• Full colour output, 5000-line scrollback, clickable links
• Pop-out button opens Windows Terminal at the same path
• Fixed right-click context menu clipping at top of screen
